channel.title: Rust-Lang on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Rust-Lang on Arrans github.io

item.title: slint-ui/slint
item.description: Slint is a declarative GUI toolkit to build native user interfaces for Rust, C++, or JavaScript apps.

item.title: rustdesk/rustdesk
item.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

item.title: borgo-lang/borgo
item.description: Borgo is a statically typed language that compiles to Go.

item.title: zaghaghi/openapi-tui
item.description: Terminal UI to list, browse and run APIs defined with openapi spec.
